name: Polynesian Pork
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut pork into bite-sized cubes.
2. Heat oil in a frying pan.
3. Stir-fry pork until lightly browned.
4. Drain pineapple and set chunks aside.
5. Combine pineapple liquid, soy sauce, ginger, and pepper.
6. Pour the mixture over the pork.
7. Cover and simmer for 20 minutes.
8. Blend cornstarch and water in a separate bowl.
9. Stir the mixture into the pan juices.
10. Bring to a boil, stir, and cook for about 3 more minutes until thickened.
11. Stir in pineapple chunks and green pepper.
12. Cook for an additional 2 to 3 minutes, stirring until the mixture coats and glazes the pork cubes.
13. Garnish with coconut.
